heading: State inspection laws
label: 60106 State inspection laws
text: When State law requires a certificate of inspection for goods carried on a vessel, a vessel transporting the goods may not be cleared until the certificate is produced.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6010646 App.:97.R.S. § 4202.This section is substituted for the source provision to eliminate unnecessary words.
